recommendations.title: The Conjuring 2
recommendations.overview: Lorraine and Ed Warren travel to north London to help a single mother raising four children alone in a house plagued by malicious spirits.

recommendations.title: Furious 7
recommendations.overview: Deckard Shaw seeks revenge against Dominic Toretto and his family for his comatose brother.

recommendations.title: Saw
recommendations.overview: David, an orderly at a hospital, tells his horrific story of being kidnapped and forced to play a vile game of survival.

recommendations.title: Insidious: Chapter 2
recommendations.overview: The haunted Lambert family seeks to uncover the mysterious childhood secret that has left them dangerously connected to the spirit world.

recommendations.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
recommendations.overview: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront.

recommendations.title: Insidious
recommendations.overview: A family discovers that dark spirits have invaded their home after their son inexplicably falls into an endless sleep. When they reach out to a professional for help, they learn things are a lot more personal than they thought.

recommendations.title: Aquaman
recommendations.overview: Half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur Curry is taken on the journey of his lifetime to discover if he is worth of being a king.

recommendations.title: Malignant
recommendations.overview: Madison is paralyzed by shocking visions of grisly murders, and her torment worsens as she discovers that these waking dreams are in fact terrifying realities with a mysterious tie to her past.

recommendations.title: Saw
